tools.name: hot100_chart
tools.description: Display the weekly Hot100.ai rankings of top AI projects. Returns ranked projects with names, scores, and URLs.

tools.name: hot100_browse
tools.description: Browse all AI projects on Hot100.ai filtered by the builder tool used (Replit, Cursor, Lovable, v0, Bolt, etc). Shows a carousel of projects you can scroll through. Searches entire database, not just current chart.

tools.name: hot100_search
tools.description: Search for AI projects on Hot100.ai by keyword, category, or description. Uses semantic search to find relevant matches. Shows an interactive search widget.

tools.name: hot100_project
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific AI project on Hot100.ai by its ID.

tools.name: hot100_browse_category
tools.description: Browse AI projects on Hot100.ai filtered by category. Available categories: writing-content, image-design, developer-tools, productivity, education, ecommerce, analytics-data, communication, audio-video, health-wellness, other
